name: com.miloooo.game.wcdb
description: A minimal native WCDB/SQLite package for Unity with compact cross-platform binaries and a data-driven C# API.

samples.description: Open a database, create a table, and perform basic CRUD operations.
Use bulk inserts and cursor-based queries for high-throughput data access.
Apply user_version-driven schema migrations with idempotent C# scripts.
